step_by_step_thinking: Answer: Agree. My agreement stands firm because the core purpose of Phase I trials revolves around assessing overall safety, which inherently includes evaluating initial dose responses and tolerability. While dose-finding is crucial within this context, it serves primarily under the umbrella of ensuring patient safety rather than being its sole focus. Hence, selecting 'Safety' best encapsulates all critical elements addressed in Phase I trials.
